headline: First Solar's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: FSLR's first-quarter EPS jumps 65.1% to $3.22, topping estimates as revenues rise 23.6% to $1.04 billion.

raw.headline: First Solar's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
raw.summary: FSLR's first-quarter EPS jumps 65.1% to $3.22, topping estimates as revenues rise 23.6% to $1.04 billion.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on First Solar, Raises Price Target to $219
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Nicholas Amicucci   maintains First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $212 to $219.
